title: 3D bowls
description: This pack makes that bowls as well as soups (including suspicious soups) have a 3D models.
body: This pack makes that bowls as well as soups (including suspicious soups) have a 3D models with a wooden texture! And if you use Optifine, it would add some textures onto the suspicious soup, so you can see the effect that the soup would give you when eaten! For Faithful 32x.
